name: Senolytics coverage candidate revision-state repair
summary: Marks the broad senolytics coverage-repair candidate as needs_revision and records that its five linked review lanes remain open until narrower source, extraction, taxonomy, synthesis-boundary, and safety repair work is completed.

scope.question: Repair the lifecycle and audit state for the senolytics coverage-repair candidate after all required review lanes returned needs_revision findings.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks this bounded self-healing repair candidate and its required review lanes.
Aligns the target candidate lifecycle and summary with linked needs_revision review findings without promoting or mutating the underlying evidence records.
